title: TaskForge
description: A distributed task queue built in Go with support for delayed jobs, retries, and dead-letter queues. Uses Redis for broker and SQLite for persistence.

title: LiveChat
description: Real-time chat application with WebSocket support, room management, message persistence, and end-to-end encryption.

title: kctl
description: A developer-friendly CLI tool for managing Kubernetes clusters. Simplifies common operations like log tailing, port forwarding, and resource inspection.

title: pgmigrate
description: Zero-dependency PostgreSQL migration tool written in Go. Supports up/down migrations, dry-run mode, and version locking.

title: dotfiles
description: Personal development environment configuration. Includes Neovim, tmux, zsh, and automated setup scripts for new machines.
